subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-02-02
subcodes.first_line: The cohorts of the Abha Kingdom are engaged in uninterrupted conquest. They are gaining victory after victory. God willing, Mrs. Stannard shall win many signal triumphs in India.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @growth of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
